record.field: Gotenberg is a developer-friendly, Docker-powered stateless API that converts many document formats into PDF files, and more.

Gotenberg is a developer-friendly, Docker-powered stateless API that converts many document formats into PDF files, and more.

It exposes a simple HTTP API: you submit files via multipart form data and receive a PDF back, with no need to manage Chromium, LibreOffice, or fonts yourself. Under the hood it drives headless Chromium for HTML, URL and Markdown rendering and LibreOffice for 100+ office formats, and adds a full suite of PDF post-processing. It targets backend developers who need reliable, programmatic document generation as a microservice.

Key features
  • Convert HTML, URLs and Markdown to PDF via headless Chromium
  • Convert DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, ODF and 100+ office formats via LibreOffice
  • PDF manipulation: merge, split, rotate, flatten and metadata editing
  • PDF security and finishing: watermark, stamp and encrypt
  • Compliance output for PDF/A and PDF/UA archival and accessibility standards
  • Stateless, horizontally scalable design with official client libraries (PHP, Go and more)
Best for

Teams and developers who need to generate, convert or post-process PDFs programmatically from their own applications, invoices, reports or document pipelines, deployed as a self-hosted microservice on a trusted network.

services: gotenberg: image: gotenberg/gotenberg:latest environment: GOTENBERG_API_BASIC_AUTH_USERNAME: {{ GOTENBERG_API_BASIC_AUTH_USERNAME }} GOTENBERG_API_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD: ${GOTENBERG_API_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD} command: - gotenberg - --api-enable-basic-auth - --api-disable-health-check-logging restart: unless-stopped container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:3000' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
